features: SCAR & STRETCH MARK TREATMENT - We’ve specially formulated our Skin Barrier Support Oil to hydrate and soften your skin and help protect against stretch marks forming, the perfect oil for scars and stretch marks.
100% NATURAL ORIGIN OIL - Our nourishing blend of plant-based oils helps to promote elasticity, evens your skin tone and supports your skin’s natural barrier repair function. The ideal pregnancy oil.

ACTIVE INGREDIENTS - We’ve selected oils that are rich in Omega 3, 6 and 9, along with Squalane and powerful antioxidants Vitamin E and Vitamin C. Replenish and protect your skin with Zowena body oil moisturiser.
LIGHTWEIGHT SILKY TEXTURE - Our luxurious oil melts into your skin with no greasiness, making it quick and easy to fit into your daily skincare ritual. You'll love our body oil for women and men!

SAFE FOR PREGNANCY & BREASTFEEDING - Our formula is made with gentle bio actives and is free of artificial fragrances, so it’s suitable for pregnancy and all skin types, including sensitive. Our stretch mark removal body oil makes a perfect pregnancy gift for first time mums.
description: Product Description Skin Barrier Support Oil Suitable for How it works Key ingredients Pregnancy skincare Recommended use Purposeful plant-based chemistry to nourish & protect your skin Use highly effective, plant-origin products that you can trust, every day.

product_details_tab_data.Title: Zowena Pregnancy Stretch Mark Oil - body oil and face oil - 100% natural moisturiser - for pregnant women - with Vitamin E oil - 60ml
product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Beauty › Skin Care › Body › Moisturisers › Oils
product_details_tab_data.Ingredients: Vitis Vinifera (Grape) Seed Oil, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Macadamia Ternifolia Seed Oil, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Squalane, Sclerocarya Birrea (Marula) Seed Oil, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Tocopherol, Ascorbyl Tetraisopalmitate, Adansonia Digitata (Baobab) Oil, Moringa Oleifera Seed Oil, Citrullus Lanatus (Melon) Seed Oil, Rosa Canina (Rosehip) Fruit Extract, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Extract, Citrus Reticulata (Green Mandarin) Peel Oil, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Oil, Pelargonium Graveolens (Rose Geranium) Oil, Cymbopogon Martini (Palmarosa) Oil, Anthemis Nobilis (Roman Chamomile) Flower Oil, Citronellol*, Farnesol*, Geraniol*, Limonene*, Linalool*. *Natural constituent of essential oils
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: For external use only. Discontinue in case of sensitivity. Store below 25°C away from sunlight and children.
